docs.title: 🚀 ShinuAILabs-MasteryHub
docs.text: A community learning engine for Quality Engineers mastering AI — from prompt engineering to autonomous testing agents.

docs.title: 🧠 QE-AI-Track — AI for Quality Engineers
docs.text:
21 progressive parts from LLM basics to building multi-agent QA pipelines.

Part Topic 01 LLM Basics — How AI models work, attention mechanisms 02 Prompt Engineering — RICE-POT framework, anti-hallucination rules 03 Job Assistant AI — Build AI tools for daily QA workflow 04 AI Agents — Core agent concepts & architectures 05 AI Agents (n8n) — No-code QA workflow automation 06 AI Agents (LangFlow) — Visual agent orchestration 07 Vibe Coding Agents — AI-assisted test generation 08 RAG — Retrieve test docs with AI 09 Multi-Source QA Copilot — Query 5 sources at once 10 MCP Basics — Model Context Protocol 11 Python for QA — Python essentials 12 MCP Creation — Build your own MCP servers 13 CrewAI Agents — Multi-agent systems 14 CrewAI QA Pipeline — End-to-end AI test pipeline 15 Production QA Pipeline — Enterprise-grade AI QA 16-19 DeepEval — AI evaluation & test quality metrics 20 Browser Pilot — AI-driven browser testing 21 LangChain — Advanced LLM orchestration

Explore QE-AI-Track →

docs.title: 🌐 Playwright-Pro-Track — Playwright + AI Mastery
docs.text:
15 progressive modules from zero JavaScript to AI-powered testing agents.

Part Topic Labs 01 JavaScript Foundation 150 labs 02 TypeScript Foundation 100 labs 03 Playwright Fundamentals 100 labs 04 Playwright Advanced 96 labs 05 Page Object Model 100 labs 06 Cucumber BDD 91 labs 07 Docker for Testing 90 labs 08 Jenkins CI/CD 90 labs 09 GitHub Actions 90 labs 10 AI-Powered Testing 90 labs 11 AI Projects 90 labs 12 Modern Patterns 90 labs 13 Cloud Infrastructure 90 labs 14 AI Agents & MCP 90 labs 15 Interview & Career 90 labs Total 1,447 labs

Explore Playwright-Pro-Track →

docs.title: 🤝 Community
docs.text:
Free, open-source, community-driven. View guidelines · Contribute

Built with ❤️ by Shinoj K Narayan (Shinu AI Labs)

docs.title: 🧠 QE-AI-Track — AI for Quality Engineers
docs.text:
21 progressive parts from LLM basics to building autonomous testing agents.

Part Topic Key Skills - 01 LLM Basics Foundation models, attention, anti-hallucination rules - 02 Prompt Engineering RICE-POT framework, 6 reusable QA templates - 03 Job Assistant AI AI tools for daily QA workflows - 04 AI Agents Agent architectures, planning, tool use - 05 AI Agents (n8n) No-code QA automation, approval gates - 06 AI Agents (LangFlow) Visual agent building, flaky test analyzer - 07 Vibe Coding Agents AI-assisted test generation - 08 RAG Chunking, embeddings, ChromaDB, Qdrant - 09 QA Copilot Multi-source RAG (FastAPI + React) - 10 MCP Basics Model Context Protocol, Playwright MCP - 11 Python for QA Python essentials for testing - 12 MCP Creation Build custom MCP servers - 13 CrewAI Agents Multi-agent QA systems - 14 CrewAI QA Pipeline End-to-end AI test pipeline - 15 Production QA Pipeline Enterprise-grade AI QA - 16-19 DeepEval AI evaluation, test quality metrics - 20 Browser Pilot AI-driven browser testing - 21 LangChain Advanced LLM orchestration

docs.title: 🎯 What You'll Learn
docs.text:
• ✅ Visual agent building
  • ✅ Flaky test analyzer (AI3X_002)
  • ✅ Vector store integration
